rationale_source: F2.FH file-hosting link detection (admin-handoff link-submission, recent commit 86605a9): URL pattern in body → admin handoff + Vienna paused per-deal

file_hosting_link_detected.rationale: file.io URL pattern in body triggers F2.FH detection per recent commit anchor.

vienna_paused_per_deal.rationale: F2.FH → Vienna paused awaiting admin manual review.

workflow_state.rationale: Deal created but Vienna processing paused (admin handles).

must_include.rationale: F2.FH detection surfaces the link-submission to admin.

outbound_emails.rationale: Vienna paused per-deal — no auto-response to broker pending admin manual review.
